dialogueChunks.intro: It is done, {player_name}. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} been dealt with. The {quest_stakes} can rest in peace now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The community gathered to honor the fallen today. Your name was spoken alongside theirs: not as a killer, but as someone who stood for our people.
dialogueChunks.outro: This was not about hatred. It was about love for the ones we lost. Thank you for understanding that.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the deed is done. You managed to {quest_action}, and the {quest_threat} will harm no one else.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} lit a fire at the {quest_focus} in remembrance. The community mourns, but there is relief in knowing the danger has passed. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_has} been honored.
dialogueChunks.outro: Vengeance is a heavy burden. You carried it well.

dialogueChunks.intro: The scales are balanced, {player_name}. The {quest_threat} answered for what they did to the {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_focus} is quiet now. {quest_ally} says the families are beginning to heal. The grief will linger, but the fear is gone.
dialogueChunks.outro: You fought for people you never knew, on behalf of a community's pain. That is a rare kind of honor.
